title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Coir Industry Act, 1953. (2) It extends to the whole of India except the State of Jammu and Kashmir*.. (3) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1 . 9th February, 1954, vide notification No. S.R.O. 470, dated 9th February, 1954, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary Part I, s. 3(ii). *. Vide notification No. S.O. 3912(E), dated 30th October, 2019, this Act is made applicable to the Union territory of Jammu and Kashmir and the Union territory of Ladakh.
